symbols.symbol: Magical/esoteric sigil characters (Theban-like or Enochian-like glyphs)

drawings.description: Three-level stacked rhombic/parallelogram grid structure drawn in perspective with dashed vertical lines connecting levels. Each level is divided into multiple cells containing numbers.
drawings.structure: 3 stacked layers, each layer divided into a 3x3 grid of parallelogram cells
drawings.lines: solid for grid edges, dashed for vertical perspective connectors

drawings.description: Same structure as upper diagram: three-level stacked rhombic grid in perspective with dashed vertical connectors, containing numbers in cells.
drawings.structure: 3 stacked layers, each layer divided into a 3x3 grid of parallelogram cells
drawings.lines: solid for grid edges, dashed for vertical perspective connectors

mixed_media_regions.description: Upper composite: drawing of stacked 3D numerical grid followed by red label and three lines of black esoteric-script text

uncertain: Script/language of the red header and black body text — resembles Theban, Enochian, or another ceremonial/esoteric alphabet; not Latin, not Hebrew, not Arabic; not reliably OCR-decodable
Exact meaning/translation of the red labels and black text bodies — cannot be determined without knowledge of the specific script used
Whether the two 3D grids represent a code, cipher key, magical seal, or instructional diagram — cannot be inferred from visual content alone
Specific identity of the 3-digit numbers (e.g., 631, 634, 636, 637, 638, 640, 641, 642, 644, 646, 648, 656) — these may be reference indices but their meaning is unknown
